description: Leading development and performance optimization of UpdraftCentral—a remote site orchestration dashboard managing tens of thousands of active nodes.
bullets: Architected secure, high-throughput WooCommerce payment checkout APIs, increasing checkout conversion by 15% on client portals.
Refactored legacy database scheduling mechanisms and hook pathways, reducing server CPU utilization by 20% across high-concurrency client clusters.
Introduced modern JavaScript asset compilation (Webpack) and static analysis tools to legacy PHP directories, reducing code deployment defects by 25%.

description: Engineered core modules, billing matrices, and deployment systems for the InstaWP site provisioning infrastructure.
bullets: Designed and authored the open-source 'Connect Helpers' Composer dependency library, facilitating secure site-monitoring sync arrays for over 100k staging environments.
Built automated internal deployment pipelines and Laravel-based microservices, reducing developer workspace onboarding and setup times by 30%.
Orchestrated performance scanners and security vulnerability audit checks inside the core Laravel dashboard to protect staging networks.

description: Contributed core plugin features and WooCommerce provisioning integrations across WordPress and Laravel environments.
bullets: Designed modular provisioning blocks and site configuration files, scaling template cloning speeds.
Built WooCommerce Stripe checkout adapters and customized user billing tier models.

description: Directed engineering for commercial blocks plugins and managed established developer platforms.
bullets: Led the frontend technical architecture of the Gutena block editor series, shipping 10+ lightweight custom React block plugins and a block theme adopted by 50,000+ active sites.
Modernized old monolith packages (Responsive Menu, Quiz And Survey Master, and Projectopia) by refactoring legacy spaghetti code into PSR-compliant, decoupled PHP classes.
Built custom licensing validation servers and secure plugin activation protocols, reducing license key leakage by 18%.

description: Engineered individual custom utility modules and payment gateways, culminating in successful acquisitions.
bullets: Developed custom WooCommerce payment extensions (UPI Payments & Razorpay Links) from the ground up, successfully acquired after gaining strong adoption within the WooCommerce ecosystem.
Audited client database query indexing structures and static resources, improving Average Page Speed indices by 45% (sub-second load times).

description: Created bespoke e-commerce checkouts and integrated regional gateway structures.
bullets: Integrated regional payment gateways and automated tax calculators for high-volume WooCommerce stores in India.
Managed client site deployments and coordinated server configurations for 30+ client accounts.
